summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Style Weaver (MORPH) app. All major features working correctly including 400 total styles (200 body + 200 hair), multi-select functionality, tab switching, and camera integration.
passed_tests: App loads correctly with MORPH branding and AI Style Experience subtitle
Two tabs present: Full Body Styles (200) and Hair Styles & Colors (200)
Category count indicator shows '10 Categories • 200 Styles' correctly
Full Body Styles tab shows 10 categories with 20 presets each (confirmed via expansion)
Hair Styles & Colors tab shows 10 categories with 20 presets each (confirmed via expansion)
Categories expand properly to show all 20 individual style presets
Tab switching works bidirectionally between Body and Hair styles
Take Photo button present, clickable, and functional for camera capture
Image upload zone present with correct 'Drop your photo here' text
Custom prompt textarea functional for user input
Multi-select style chaining architecture implemented (preset buttons with + icons)
Style selection UI shows proper preset organization and labeling
